problem.title: DLO trade-off on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)
problem.question: Which DLO profile on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Baseline DLO GICP keyframe odometry for KITTI-scale LiDAR.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser downsampling and fewer GICP iterations.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer voxels, more map keyframes, and deeper GICP.
